title: Line
text: Line An Area is a Development Object that defines a vertical or horizontal line in the layout of a Form or Report component. It is not possible to style a Line and a line cannot be resized when the component is resized. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: lin Main Development Object? No Part of: Form . Report Contains: — Generalization: Frame Specializations: None Compilation Output: — URI format: cpt: ComponentName /lin: LineId Specialization Line specializes Frame in the following ways: It has no code containers. It can only have the component as a parent. Properties Object properties: Name Type Location Presentation properties: Left (xpos) Top (ypos) Width (xsize) Height (ysize) Was this topic helpful?
